prioritized_fixes.title: Reframe H_Mech as exploratory, not confirmatory
prioritized_fixes.description: The post-hoc criterion revision (93.3% failure of original criteria) means H_Mech should not be presented as confirmatory. The paper itself acknowledges this. The contribution should be rephrased as 'empirical evidence from a factorial decomposition pilot' rather than 'confirmed hypothesis.' Alternatively, pre-register revised criteria publicly before any future replication.

prioritized_fixes.title: Clarify metric labels in Table 1
prioritized_fixes.description: Table 1 presents three different absorption metrics (overlap fraction, Jaccard overlap, cosine-based) without distinguishing them. Add a metric label column or split into metric-specific tables. The abstract should also note which metric the encoder effect uses.

prioritized_fixes.title: Investigate zero-variance random baseline
prioritized_fixes.description: Random SAEs show std ~1e-17 across all seeds, meaning absorption is deterministic for random weights. This is suspicious and may indicate (a) measurement insensitivity or (b) TopK artifact. Investigate and report findings. Effect sizes (Cohen's d) may be inflated if one distribution has near-zero variance.

prioritized_fixes.title: Add d_model=512 validation point
prioritized_fixes.description: All synthetic experiments use d_model=128, far below real LLM dimensions (768-12,288). Add at least one d_model=512 condition to the factorial design to establish scalability of encoder dominance finding.

prioritized_fixes.title: Increase held-out generalization n
prioritized_fixes.description: Current held-out has n=1 hierarchy per seed (5 total data points for correlation). Increase to n=3 per seed (15 total) for a reliable correlation estimate. Report confidence interval for r.

prioritized_fixes.title: Remove or fulfill ANOVA promise
prioritized_fixes.description: Section 3.5 (methodology) promises a one-way ANOVA across all variants but it never appears in Results. Either add it with appropriate caveats about low power, or remove the promise from methodology.

prioritized_fixes.title: Reframe novelty claims precisely
prioritized_fixes.description: The paper claims 'first factorial decomposition' and 'encoder dominance' as novel contributions. Oursland (2026) already predicts encoder-decoder asymmetry theoretically. Reframe as 'first empirical quantification via controlled factorial decomposition' to avoid overclaiming.

prioritized_fixes.title: Distinguish capacity-pressure from TopK artifact
prioritized_fixes.description: The L0-capacity mechanism (lower L0 -> higher absorption) could be a genuine encoder effect or could be a TopK artifact (different sparsity patterns at different K). Compare with JumpReLU SAE at equivalent L0 to distinguish.

prioritized_fixes.title: Fix Figure 9 reference
prioritized_fixes.description: Figure 9 (figure_9_summary_table.pdf) is listed in the figure list but never cited in text. Either cite it or remove it from the figure list.

prioritized_fixes.title: Fix steering sensitivity metric
prioritized_fixes.description: Steering sensitivity is measured as ablation-induced reconstruction change, not steering-induced activation change. Use activation magnitude change as the primary steering responsiveness metric.

summary.top_priority: AF-1 (reframe H_Mech as exploratory) and AF-3 (investigate zero-variance baseline)
